MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Susan Parkinson, Esq., and there being no appearance by the defendant, the court orders the request for jury trial stricken. Trial date is confirmed.
